title: ensure_param_file: deletes cached file before download; file lost if download fails
description: wallet/src/params.rs ensure_param_file: on hash mismatch calls std::fs::remove_file(path) then fetch_combined(). If the network is down, the original file is already deleted and the error message only says 'check network' with no hint the cached file was removed. Trigger: valid-but-outdated cached params + no network access. Bad behavior: user is left with no params file at all; recovery requires 'nie wallet init' with network, but the error message does not say this. Fix: fetch into tmp first, verify, then atomically replace (or skip the eager delete and rely on the existing tmp/rename path).
